orthography2ipa — language data explorer

Every registered orthography → IPA spec, with its cited academic sources, in one browsable page.
production — full coverage, regression-tested, cited sources research — validated against published phonology; positional rules present skeleton — auto-generated graphemes/allophones, unvalidated stub — code + name + family + script only
Gold benchmark data is a grain of salt — PER is directional, not a certification. See docs/benchmarks.md and docs/scoreboard.md.

    Select a language from the list.

    Genetic descent from each spec's parent. Dashed rings are ancestry groupings (proto-languages, medieval stages) with no gold of their own. Click a name to open it.

      Contact graph

      parent (descent) adstrate substrate superstrate

      Select a language (from Browse or the tree) to see its lineage & contact neighbourhood.

      orthography2ipa · static, offline, no network requests · data generated from the registry
